🌟 Pangrams

STRAINERTERRAINS

All Answers (10 words)

STRAINER noun Pangram

A device used to separate solids from liquids.

TERRAINS noun Pangram

Plural of terrain; stretches of land.

RETAIN verb

To keep possession of.

STRAIN verb

To make an unusually great effort.

TRAIN noun

A series of connected vehicles.

STAIN noun

A mark left by a substance.

SAINT noun

A person acknowledged as holy.

SATIN noun

A smooth, glossy fabric.

ANTIS noun

Plural of anti; those opposed.

TANS verb

To make brown by sun exposure.
